word: G244 - ἀλλοτριεπίσκοπος - allotriepískopos - al-lot-ree-ep-is'-kop-os - Busybody in other men's matters

sections.paragraph:
ἀλλοτριεπίσκοπος - allotriepiskopos - al-lot-ree-ep-is'-kop-os

From G245 and G1985; overseeing others' affairs, that is, a meddler (specifically in Gentile customs): - busybody in other men’s matters.
